_meta.notes: Maps our BUILD-SPEC element IDs to template nicknames. Melania renames template elements to match our code via documentServices API. Items marked MISMATCH require architectural decisions before mapping.

cartBadge.note: No separate cart badge element in template — badge is part of shoppingCartIcon1 TPAWidget

headerSearchInput.note: Template has SearchButton widget, not a bare input. Our code does $w('#headerSearchInput').role = 'search' — may need API adjustment

productTitle.note: Product title text — referenced in masterPage for side cart display. Must be on Product Page, not masterPage template

sideCartPanel.note: No side cart panel in template — must be added as new element

justAddedHighlight.note: Part of side cart — not in template

a11yLiveRegion.note: Accessibility live region — must be added as hidden text element

masterPage_mobile_menu._note: Our code uses initMobileDrawer() from navigationHelpers.js which creates a custom drawer. Template has built-in Wix hamburger menu. Decision needed: use template's built-in mobile menu OR add custom elements.

newsletterEmail.note: Template has form2 (TPAWidget newsletter form) — our code expects separate input + submit. Need to decide: use Wix form widget or add bare elements

newsletterSubmit.note: See newsletterEmail — part of form2 TPAWidget

newsletterError.note: Validation error text — must be added

businessSchemaHtml.note: Hidden HtmlComponent for JSON-LD schema — must be added

websiteSchemaHtml.note: Hidden HtmlComponent for website schema — must be added

heroOverlay.note: Hero text overlay container — could be box28 or box29

categoryRepeater.note: *** CRITICAL: Template has 4 individual Container cards (box26, box24, box22, box20), NOT a Repeater. Our code uses $w('#categoryRepeater').onItemReady() which requires a Repeater element. Options: (A) Add a Repeater element and remove individual cards, (B) Refactor code to address individual cards ***

home_featured_products._comment: Best Sellers — section6 (Products Gallery / Best Sellers)

featuredSubtitle.note: No subtitle in template section — must be added

featuredRepeater.note: *** CRITICAL: Template has TPAWidget (Wix Pro Gallery), NOT a Repeater. Pro Gallery does not support .onItemReady(). Options: (A) Replace Pro Gallery with Repeater in editor, (B) Refactor code to use Pro Gallery API, (C) Add a Repeater element alongside/replacing gallery ***

featuredQuickViewModal.note: Quick view modal — must be added as overlay/lightbox

featuredQvImage.note: Quick view product image — part of modal

featuredQvName.note: Quick view product name — part of modal

featuredQvPrice.note: Quick view product price — part of modal

featuredQvAddToCart.note: Quick view add to cart button — part of modal

featuredQvViewFull.note: Quick view 'view full details' link — part of modal

featuredQvClose.note: Quick view close button — part of modal

saleRepeater.note: *** CRITICAL: Same as featuredRepeater — TPAWidget Pro Gallery, NOT Repeater ***

swatchPromoSection.note: Promotional section — template shows generic promo, our code has swatch promo

home_about._note: Template about section has text + images + Learn More CTA. Our code doesn't reference these IDs directly in Home.js — the About section is handled by About page. These map for completeness.

testimonialRepeater.note: Template's repeater1 is for PRESS LOGOS (As Seen In), but our code uses testimonialRepeater for customer testimonials. These are different content types. May need separate repeaters.

testimonialSection.note: Testimonial section — template has Press/As Seen In section instead. Need to add testimonial section or repurpose

testimonialPauseBtn.note: Slideshow pause button — must be added

testimonialSchemaScript.note: Hidden script for testimonial schema — must be added

home_instagram._note: Template has gallery1 (TPAWidget Instagram gallery). Our code doesn't reference Instagram section elements in Home.js — this is handled by external widget.

home_misc._comment: Elements in our code with no template section

ridgelineHeader.note: Mountain ridgeline SVG header decoration — must be added as HtmlComponent

trustBar.note: Trust signals bar (Free Shipping, Warranty, etc.) — must be added

videoShowcaseSection.note: Video showcase section — must be added

quizCTASection.note: Style quiz CTA section — must be added

recentSection.note: Recently viewed products section — must be added

masterPage_promo_exit._comment: Promo lightbox + exit-intent popup — masterPage overlays, no template equivalent
masterPage_promo_exit._note: These are overlay/modal elements that don't exist in the template. All must be added as new elements: lightbox containers, overlay backgrounds, text elements, buttons, form inputs.

criticalMismatches: featuredRepeater → gridGallery1: Pro Gallery, not Repeater. Code uses .onItemReady() which only works on Repeaters.
saleRepeater → gridGallery2: Same Pro Gallery vs Repeater mismatch.
categoryRepeater → 4 individual cards: No repeater at all — template has static containers.
newsletterEmail/Submit → form2: Template uses TPAWidget form, code expects bare input+button.
headerSearchInput → searchButton2: Template has SearchButton widget, code expects text input.
_summary.recommendation: Phase the hookup: (1) Rename 14 directly-mappable elements via documentServices API immediately. (2) Decide on Repeater vs Pro Gallery strategy for product grids — this is the biggest architectural question. (3) Add the 55 missing elements in batches, starting with must-haves (schema, a11y, skeleton loaders) and deferring nice-to-haves (promo lightbox, exit intent, video showcase).
